utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) – fully specified; travel_dates (2024-06-13 to 2024-06-17) – fully specified; transportation (flight details with costs) – fully specified; accommodation (hotel with costs) – fully specified; activities (listed with total cost) – fully specified; additional_services (insurance, guide, total cost) – fully specified; total_budget (breakdown with totals) – fully specified. The extra 'restaurants' entry is not required but doesn’t affect completeness. Therefore, all 7 required items are present and detailed.
